examples: The compound has good herbicidal function to crabgrass and abutilon.
It appears that the plant is called abutilon or Chinese lantern. It is a twiggy and lanky plant but the flowers are prolific.
A tropical Asian annual herb(Abutilon theophrasti) naturalized in the United States, having large, velvety, heart-shaped leaves and yellow flowers. It is an important fiber plant in northern China.
